data.name: Users.EmailOrUsernameAlreadyRegistered
data.value: The provided email or username is already registered.

data.name: Identity.InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: The refresh token is invalid or expired.

data.name: Identity.TokenReuseDetected
data.value: Refresh token reuse detected. All sessions have been revoked.

data.name: Identity.WeakPassword
data.value: The password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a number and a special character.

data.name: Identity.InvalidPasswordResetToken
data.value: The password reset token is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Identity.InvalidActivationToken
data.value: The activation token is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Identity.MfaAlreadyEnabled
data.value: MFA is already enabled for this account.

data.name: Identity.MfaNotEnabled
data.value: MFA is not enabled for this account.

data.name: Identity.MfaSetupNotFound
data.value: No pending MFA setup was found. Start the setup again.

data.name: Identity.InvalidMfaCode
data.value: The provided MFA code is invalid.

data.name: Identity.InvalidMfaChallenge
data.value: The MFA challenge is invalid or has expired.
